creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Update Makefile, set IS_INTERACTIVE to YES since bento fails on configuring it with multibyte

Fix: 

BUILD_DEPENDS= autoconf:${PORTSDIR}/devel/autoconf

+IS_INTERACTIVE=        YES
+
 INSTALLS_SHLIB=        YES
 LDCONFIG_DIRS= %%PREFIX%%/pgsql/lib--pZi7D1Q9A9ihJnzmkIajVEObL6FDWNrF9hkEiNXJmft99Ehd
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Tue Dec 26 15:18:00 2000
+++ Makefile    Tue Dec 26 15:18:38 2000
@@ -24,6 +24,8 @@
